step2.ptxt: Connect the intelligent tester to the DLC3.

step3.ptxt: Connect the intelligent tester to the Controller Area Network Vehicle Interface Module (CAN VIM). Then connect the CAN VIM to the Data Link Connector 3 (DLC3).

step2.ptxt: Read the DTCs by following the prompts on the tester screen.

atten4.ptxt: Refer to the intelligent tester operator's manual for further details.

step2.ptxt: Connect the intelligent tester to the DLC3.
Operate the intelligent tester to erase the codes.

atten4.ptxt: Refer to the intelligent tester operator's manual for further details.
